title: Template injection in run block
description: Avoid expanding user-controlled variables directly in `run:` blocks. Use environment variables instead.

title: Action used without commit SHA
description: The `actions/checkout@v4` action is not pinned to a full commit SHA. Pin to a specific revision to prevent supply chain attacks.

title: Secret passed as command-line argument
description: A secret is passed directly to a script argument, which may be visible in process listings. Use environment variables.

title: Workflow run ID used in artifact name
description: Using the run ID without sanitisation can lead to path traversal attacks. Use a safe slug generator.

title: Self-hosted runner without security hardening
description: A self-hosted runner is used but no `securityContext` or `runAs` configured. Enable strict isolation.
